page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture using the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across multiple workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1889.28 and a multi-core score of 15481.55, supported by a 48 MB L3 cache. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 835.37 GB/sec and an uncached large block write bandwidth of 55.52 GB/sec. In database operations, the instance achieves 15.62 million operations per second on Redis SET tasks, while static web serving throughput reaches 21.05 GB/sec.

The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 Foundation and AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions, which assist in vector calculations and cryptography. This is reflected in the LLM inference benchmarks, where a small 135M model processes prompts at 1294.06 tokens per second, and a medium 7B model processes prompts at 31.85 tokens per second. The lack of local NVMe storage and dedicated GPUs represents a tradeoff, positioning this instance for workloads that do not require local high-speed scratch disks or hardware acceleration. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, Redis caching, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results show solid mid-range performance, with a multi-core stress-ng score of 15481.55, a Redis SET throughput of 15.62 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput of 21.05 GB/sec. Supported by AVX-512 instruction sets, it handles tasks like web serving, caching, and moderate database operations efficiently, offering a balanced resource profile for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering balanced performance for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and 64 GB of memory for reliable enterprise workloads.
